title: XUM PC Legend Intel Core i7-3770 3.4GHz DDR3 16GB RAM 256GB NVMe SSD 1TB HDD GT 730 2GB Graphics
features: Reliable Intel Core i7-3770: Proven 3.4GHz quad-core processor offers dependable performance for everyday tasks and multitasking, perfect for those who need power on a budget.
Ample Storage: 256GB NVMe SSD for fast boot times plus 1TB HDD for extensive storage.
Enhanced Memory: 16GB DDR3 RAM to handle multiple applications effortlessly.
Graphics Support: GT 730 2GB GPU for light gaming, video streaming, and graphic-intensive tasks.
Versatile Use: Perfect for studying, everyday tasks, media, and productivity.
description: Product Description Experience the thrill of gaming with XUM. Our diverse range of PCs caters to all, from budget-friendly setups for novices to high-end systems for seasoned pros. With XUM, you're not just buying a PC, you're investing in superior performance and exceptional value. Whether you're a casual gamer or a hardcore enthusiast, XUM is your go-to destination for the perfect gaming rig. Don't compromise on your gaming experience or your budget - choose XUM. XUM Legend Desktop PC Make your PC your own. Create your own Legend! Here at XUM, we know how important it is to feel like a legend. That's why we've created the XUM Legend. It comes with a remote control for addressable RGB that allows you to change all the lights on your PC to whatever shade of amazingness you want. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Includes RGB Remote, WiFi Antennas or WiFi USB, Power Lead and a User Manual What games can this play? This is not a gaming PC! Why is this PC Windows 10? Per Microsoft's requirements, Windows 11 is supported only by Intel 8th generation CPUs or newer. Therefore, our i7-3770 PCs are limited to Windows 10. Please note, following Microsoft guidelines, we cannot assist in installing Win11 on these systems
